review_summary: Inline values = new object each render = all consumers re-render every parent render.

issues_found.title: Inline object values
issues_found.explanation: Every render of AppProviders creates new objects. All consumers re-render.

review_summary: AbortError uncaught. Plus ac.current accessed after await may be stale.

issues_found.title: Stale check
issues_found.explanation: If aborted, fetch rejects with AbortError - uncaught.

issues_found.title: In-flight on unmount
issues_found.explanation: Component unmount = no abort.

review_summary: Fire-and-forget save. If user navigates away before save completes, lost.

issues_found.title: Fire-and-forget
issues_found.explanation: Navigation cancels in-flight fetch in some browsers. Data lost.

issues_found.title: Don't navigate if failed
issues_found.explanation: User goes to /next even if save failed.

issues_found.title: For fire-and-forget on navigation
issues_found.explanation: sendBeacon survives navigation

broader_pattern: Save before navigate; sendBeacon for fire-and-forget.

review_summary: size undefined renders 'undefined' in class. No default value.

issues_found.title: undefined in className
issues_found.explanation: className='primary undefined' is wrong.

review_summary: Not radios. No role, no keyboard, no group semantics.

issues_found.title: Not radio
issues_found.explanation: No role=radio, role=radiogroup. SR doesn't know.

issues_found.title: No arrow keys
issues_found.explanation: Standard radio: arrows select.

issues_found.title: Click label doesn't select
issues_found.explanation: Standard

what_makes_this_review_senior: Native radio + visual styling; fieldset for group.

review_summary: count is derived from items.length. Can go out of sync. Don't store derived state.

issues_found.title: Derived state stored
issues_found.explanation: items + count must stay in sync manually. Bug surface.

review_summary: register's ref conflicts with inputRef. Plus errors object reference triggers each render.

issues_found.title: Conflicting refs
issues_found.explanation: register sets its own ref. Manual ref overrides. RHF can't track.

issues_found.title: Re-fires every render
issues_found.explanation: errors object new each render even when same.

review_summary: Backdrop always in DOM blocking interaction. Plus pointer-events.

issues_found.title: Pointer events on hidden
issues_found.explanation: opacity 0 = invisible but still receives clicks. Blocks UI even when not visible.

issues_found.title: DOM weight
issues_found.explanation: Always in DOM even when closed.

what_makes_this_review_senior: opacity vs pointer-events; AnimatePresence for mount/unmount animations.

review_summary: registerables registers ALL chart types. Bar chart needs Bar only.

issues_found.title: All chart types
issues_found.explanation: 100+ KB for line, pie, doughnut, radar, etc. you don't use.

code_under_review:
<Suspense fallback={<ErrorBoundary fallback={<Error />}><Spinner /></ErrorBoundary>}>
  <Content />
</Suspense>
review_summary: ErrorBoundary in fallback doesn't catch errors in Content - it only wraps Spinner.

issues_found.title: Wrong scope
issues_found.explanation: Fallback renders during loading. ErrorBoundary inside catches errors in Spinner only.

issues_that_arent_issues: None really - this is the issue.
broader_pattern: ErrorBoundary placement: outside Suspense for Suspense errors.
fixed_code:
<ErrorBoundary fallback={<Error />}>
  <Suspense fallback={<Spinner />}>
    <Content />
  </Suspense>
</ErrorBoundary>

review_summary: Two-render flicker. Plus loses user edits when prop changes.

issues_found.title: Two-render flicker
issues_found.explanation: initialValue changes → effect fires → setState → re-render. User briefly sees old value.

issues_found.title: Lost edits
issues_found.explanation: User edits, parent re-renders with new initialValue → effect overrides.

what_makes_this_review_senior: key prop for reset; in-render sync vs effect sync.

review_summary: 5 unrelated concerns in one effect. Hard to test, hard to maintain.

issues_found.title: Multiple concerns
issues_found.explanation: Each concern should be its own effect or hook.

review_summary: JS-readable cookie = XSS reads. Should be httpOnly set by server.

issues_found.title: Not httpOnly
issues_found.explanation: JS-set cookie is readable by JS. XSS steals.

issues_found.title: HTTP-readable cookie
issues_found.explanation: On HTTP page, cookie sent over plain HTTP.

issues_found.title: CSRF
issues_found.explanation: Missing SameSite = vulnerable to CSRF

broader_pattern: Cookies: server-set with httpOnly + Secure + SameSite.
what_makes_this_review_senior: httpOnly + Secure + SameSite cookie flags; server sets, not client.

review_summary: UA in render = SSR mismatch + unreliable detection.

issues_found.title: SSR mismatch
issues_found.explanation: Server: no UA. Client: detects.

issues_found.title: Spoofable
issues_found.explanation: UA strings change.

review_summary: Both BetaApp and StableApp included in bundle regardless. Plus require() not ESM.

issues_found.title: Both shipped
issues_found.explanation: Static import = both in bundle.

issues_found.title: Use ESM
issues_found.explanation: require may break tree-shake.

what_makes_this_review_senior: Feature flag splitting; build-time vs runtime flags.

review_summary: setState in render = derived state anti-pattern. Plus infinite loop if not careful.

issues_found.title: Derived state via setState
issues_found.explanation: hasItems is derived from items.length. Use directly.

issues_that_arent_issues: Setting state during render IS valid (React optimizes) but should be guarded.
broader_pattern: Derive in render, don't store derived.

review_summary: dispatch is stable from Redux/Zustand. Deps OK. But fetchData() called every render dep changes (which is never).

issues_found.title: dispatch is always stable
issues_found.explanation: Redux dispatch is stable; lint requires it in deps but never changes.

broader_pattern: Stable refs in deps are fine.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Recognizing stable references; not all deps cause re-fires.

review_summary: Reducers must be pure. Side effects belong in middleware or external.

issues_found.title: Impure reducer
issues_found.explanation: Reducers must be pure. Side effects break React's optimizations.

what_makes_this_review_senior: Pure reducers; side effects in effects/middleware.

review_summary: cache.get returns unknown. Cast lies. cached could be wrong type.

issues_found.title: Cast doesn't validate
issues_found.explanation: If cache stores other types, runtime crash.

review_summary: Color-only. Color blind users don't see. No aria-invalid.

issues_found.title: Color blind miss
issues_found.explanation: Red border invisible to deuteranopia.

issues_found.title: SR doesn't know
issues_found.explanation: Standard

issues_that_arent_issues: Border style OK with additional indicators.

review_summary: Race if called twice. Both read 0, both set 1.

issues_found.title: Race condition
issues_found.explanation: Two concurrent increments race; one increment lost.

what_makes_this_review_senior: Race conditions in state updates; functional update.

review_summary: Clear on failure too (await throws caught nowhere). Plus duplicates defaults.

issues_found.title: Fail loses data
issues_found.explanation: If save fails, submit throws, data still exists - but no error UI.

issues_found.title: Maintenance
issues_found.explanation: Reset to same shape as initial. Define once.

review_summary: React state for 100 particles × 60Hz = 6000 re-renders/sec.

issues_found.title: Massive re-render
issues_found.explanation: 100 particles × 60Hz × full setState = perf disaster.

broader_pattern: Many particles = canvas or CSS keyframes.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Canvas for many-particle animations; libraries exist.

scenario: Including ES5 polyfills for modern target.
review_summary: IE11 dead. Legacy build doubles bundle. Stop supporting.

issues_found.title: IE11 EOL
issues_found.explanation: IE11 retired 2022. Most companies dropped support.

review_summary: Same error likely repeats. No error message shown. No telemetry.

issues_found.title: User has no info
issues_found.explanation: What broke? Just a button. Unhelpful.

issues_found.title: Errors invisible to team
issues_found.explanation: No Sentry call.

issues_found.title: Same error retries
issues_found.explanation: Likely fails again. Should also offer reload.

broader_pattern: Error UX: message + retry + reload + telemetry.
what_makes_this_review_senior: Full error UX: message, multiple recovery, telemetry.
